# setDefaultOutputDevice(_:)

**Instance Method**

Set the defaultOutputDevice property.

## Declaration

```swift
func setDefaultOutputDevice(_ device: AudioHardwareDevice) throws
```

## Parameters

- **device**: An AudioHardwareDevice to use as the default output audio device
